message:
fix(writing): generalize 0791bae TOC-jump fix to remaining 7 sections

Commit 0791bae fixed the #cost TOC jump so scrollIntoView lands on the
tall section wrapper instead of the small SectionHeader inner div,
avoiding the lazy-viz-mount layout-shift race that was flaking the
TOC E2E under load. The fix was only applied to the cost section.

The same pattern exists for every other TOC-targeted section whose id
lived on the SectionHeader: what-is-it, setup, folder, tips, showcase,
attorney, faq. Each was one layout-shift away from the same race.

Moved the anchor id to the <section> wrapper for all seven and renamed
the SectionHeader to {id}-heading to keep ids unique. Intro and
pattern sections already had section-level ids and stay untouched.

All 18 ids are now unique (verified). No TOC link targets change —
href="#setup" etc. still resolve because the id lives on the wrapper.

bun tsc --noEmit clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
